title: Trains Collide in UK, Killing at Least One and Injuring Dozens of Others
summary_full: At least one person was killed and dozens of others were injured in the crash near Bedford, England, the authorities said.
summary_public: At least one person was killed and dozens of others were injured in the crash near Bedford, England, the authorities said.
